title: Tensura Compat: Ice & Fire
description: A compatibility brigde between Tensura: Reincarnated and Ice & Fire.
body:
This is a compatibility mod, a bridge between 2 mods: [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated) and [Ice & Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons).

**Features**
* Default EP and Abilities (Skills/Magics/Battlewills) for Ice & Fire mobs.
* Default EP for Ice & Fire gears.
* Stage 4/5 Dragons drop Dragon Essences - Configuarable.
* Entity/Item/Block tags for Ice & Fire's contents.

**Permission**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
You can use this mod in mod packs, videos, reviews, and servers.
You can not modify and share the mod without permission.
You can not repost the mod somewhere else without us knowing it.
</details>
